widgets.embedFormDesc: Put a booking widget on your website. Visitors can request quotes without calling you.
widgets.shareLinkDesc: Send a branded link that lets any prospect request an instant AI quote from you in 60 seconds.

pipeline.emptyDesc: Create and send cleaning quotes to start tracking your conversion funnel.

attention.followupsDesc: {{amount}} in sent quotes not yet responded to.
attention.draftsDesc: Unsent quotes cannot close. Send them today.
attention.closeRateDesc: Under 30% — follow up faster to close more cleans.
attention.ghostDesc: {{count}} quote{{s}} sent 48h+ ago with no view. Time to call.

aiTools.handleObjectionsDesc: Turn pricing pushback into closed jobs.
aiTools.draftFollowupDesc: Write a sharp follow-up message in seconds.

aiTools.pitchRecurringDesc: Generate an upsell script for recurring cleans.
aiTools.reengageLostDesc: Bring back a prospect that went quiet.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.noJobsDesc: Accept a quote to book your first cleaning job, or create one manually.
jobs.notFoundDesc: This job may have been deleted

detail.noChecklistDesc: Checklist items are created when the job is set up

quoteSettings.heading: Quote Preferences
quoteSettings.subheading: Customize what appears on your customer-facing quotes

sections.brandColorDesc: Set a brand color that appears on your customer-facing quotes.
sections.serviceTiersDesc: These descriptions appear on your customer-facing quote page under each option. Use 1–3 sentences to explain what's included so customers can choose with confidence.
sections.addOnPricesDesc: Set the default name and price for each optional add-on shown in residential quotes. Toggle to enable or disable each add-on for new quotes.

fields.showLogoDesc: Display your business logo on the quote
fields.showCompanyNameDesc: Display your company name at the top
fields.showAddressDesc: Include your business address on the quote
fields.showPhoneDesc: Display your phone number for customer contact
fields.showEmailDesc: Include your email address on the quote
fields.showSignatureDesc: Add a line for the customer to sign
fields.showEstimatedTimeDesc: Display estimated time to complete the job
fields.showPaymentOptionsDesc: List accepted payment methods on the quote
fields.showBookingLinkDesc: Include a link for customers to book directly
fields.showTermsDesc: Display your terms and conditions text

finance.title: Finance
finance.description: Collect payments, track revenue, and get AI-powered financial insights

audit.allHaveCard: All customers have a card on file.

askAi.title: Finance AI Assistant
askAi.subtitle: Ask anything about your payments and revenue
askAi.error: Sorry, I ran into an error. Please try again.

suggestedQuestions.collectionRate: What's my collection rate this month?
suggestedQuestions.missedRevenue: How much revenue have I missed from failed charges?
suggestedQuestions.paymentSummary: Show me a summary of my payment activity
suggestedQuestions.chargedThisWeek: Which jobs were charged this week?

language.title: Language Settings
language.appLanguageDesc: Controls the language of the QuotePro interface for your account.
language.outboundLanguageDesc: Controls the language used for quotes, emails, texts, and reminders sent to your customers.
language.separation: These two settings are independent — you can use QuotePro in English while sending customer communications in Spanish, for example.
language.customerLanguageDesc: Overrides the default outbound language for messages sent to this specific customer.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account details, subscription, and preferences
settings.name: Name
settings.subtitle2: Manage your business, pricing, and integrations

business.emailSentDesc1: When you send quotes, confirmations, or follow-ups, customers see your company name as the sender.
business.emailSentDesc2: Customer replies go directly to your business email:
business.emailSentNoEmail: (add your email above so customers can reply to you)
business.emailSentFooter: No extra setup needed — just keep your business name and email up to date above.
business.residentialBasePricingDesc: These values are used by Live Quote Preview and all residential quote calculations. Changes affect future quotes.
business.addonPricingDesc: Set default prices for add-on services included in quotes.

branding.logoDesc: Your logo appears on customer-facing quotes when the "Show Logo" toggle is enabled in Quote Preferences.
branding.senderIdentityDesc: How your name and title appear on quotes and emails.
branding.bookingLinkHelper: Included in quotes and follow-up messages
branding.signaturesDesc: Custom signature appended to your outgoing emails.
branding.businessLogoDesc: Your logo appears on quotes, invoices, and your customer portal.

payments.paymentHandlesDesc: Add your payment handles so customers can pay you directly.
payments.acceptedMethodsDesc: Choose which payment methods you accept. These are shown on your quotes.
payments.paymentNotesDesc: Additional notes shown on quotes regarding payment terms.
payments.autoChargeDesc: Automatically charge all completed, unpaid jobs with a card on file at a set time each day. Requires Stripe Connect to be set up.

automations.dailyReminderDesc: Get a daily notification reminding you to follow up with pending quotes.
automations.enableDailyPulseDesc: Receive a daily follow-up reminder notification
automations.weeklyRecapDesc: Receive a weekly summary of your quotes, revenue, and performance.
automations.quietHoursDesc: Pause all automated messages during these hours.
automations.enableQuietHoursDesc: No automated messages during quiet hours
automations.dailyFollowUpDesc: Automatically follow up with leads who have not responded.

reminders.automatedDesc: Remind customers before their appointments automatically — reducing no-shows and saving you hours of manual outreach.
reminders.emailOneDayBefore: Email them one day before appointment
reminders.emailTwoDaysBefore: Email them two days before appointment
reminders.emailThreeDaysBefore: Email them three days before appointment
reminders.emailOneWeekBefore: Email them one week before appointment
reminders.messagePreviewDesc: This is what your customers will receive:
reminders.reminderTomorrow: You've got a cleaning appointment scheduled for tomorrow
reminders.reminderDays: Your cleaning appointment is in {{days}} days
reminders.sendTestDesc: Send a test reminder to your own phone and email so you can see exactly what customers receive.
reminders.testSent: Test sent! Check your phone and email.
reminders.cleanerNotificationsDesc: Automatically notify your team about upcoming jobs via email and text.
reminders.notifyCleanersDesc: Send job details to assigned team members
reminders.both: Both — when assigned AND day before
reminders.teamMemberNotificationsDesc: Send a test notification to a specific team member.
reminders.automatedRemindersDesc: Send automatic reminders to customers before their scheduled cleaning.

reviews.googleReviewsDesc: Configure your Google review link and how reviews are requested.
reviews.googleReviewHelper: Paste your Google Business review link
reviews.includeOnPdf: Include review link on PDF quotes
reviews.includeOnPdfDesc: Add a review request to the bottom of quote PDFs
reviews.includeInMessagesDesc: Add a review request to follow-up messages
reviews.askAfterComplete: Ask for review after job completion
reviews.askAfterCompleteDesc: Automatically prompt for a review when a job is marked complete
reviews.referralProgramDesc: Set up your referral offer to encourage customers to refer friends.
reviews.referralOfferHelper: Discount offered to customers who refer new clients
reviews.referralBookingHelper: Link included in referral messages for easy booking
reviews.googleReviewUrlHelper: Paste the link customers click to leave a Google review.
reviews.askAfterJobDesc: Automatically ask customers for a review after each completed job.
reviews.referralOfferAmountHelper: Dollar amount to offer customers who refer a new client.
reviews.referralBookingLinkHelper: Link where referred customers can book their first appointment.

tips.automatedTipsDesc: When enabled, QuotePro automatically sends your customer a personalized tip link after each completed job. Customers can tip securely via Stripe — no awkward cash conversations needed.
tips.enableTipsDesc: Send a tip link to customers after job completion
tips.suggestedPercentagesDesc: Customers will see preset tip amounts based on their job total.
tips.tipsWillAppear: Tips will appear here once customers start tipping.

features.customerPortalDesc: Give each customer a personal "My Home" portal — they can view upcoming cleans, after photos, and set home preferences.
features.enablePortalsDesc: Customers can access their portal at /home/[unique-token]
features.portalColorDesc: Hex color used for the portal header and buttons. Defaults to your primary brand color.
features.welcomeMessageDesc: Shown to customers at the top of their portal. Keep it warm and personal.
features.shareLinks: Share links from any Customer Detail page
features.enableCommercialDesc: Create quotes for commercial facilities with labor estimates, tiered pricing, and proposals
features.languageCurrencyDesc: Choose the language and currency used across your account, quotes, and customer communications.
features.commLanguageDesc: Language used for AI-generated quotes and emails sent to customers
features.currencyDesc: Used for all pricing displays, quotes, and revenue figures throughout the app
features.portalAccentColorDesc: Customize the color of buttons and highlights in the customer portal.
features.shareLinksHint: Share portal links from each customer's profile
features.featuresTitleDesc: Enable or disable app features based on your workflow.
features.appLanguageDesc: Set the language for your dashboard and outgoing communications.

booking.upgradeBannerDesc: Self-booking lets accepted customers pick their own appointment time. Upgrade to enable it.
booking.selfBookingDesc: When enabled, customers who accept a quote will see a calendar and can book their own appointment — no back-and-forth needed.
booking.enableSelfBookingDesc: Customers can schedule their own appointment after accepting a quote
booking.availableDaysDesc: Which days of the week can customers book appointments?
booking.timeWindowsDesc: Set the hours when appointments can be booked. You can add multiple windows per day.
booking.slotDurationDesc: How long is each job slot?
booking.minNoticeDesc: How far in advance must customers book?
booking.maxPerDayDesc: Maximum number of jobs that can be scheduled on the same day
booking.blackoutDatesDesc: Dates when no bookings are available (holidays, vacations, etc.)
booking.confirmationMessageDesc: Shown to customers after they book and included in the confirmation email
booking.serviceAreaNotesDesc: Optional note shown on the booking page (e.g., "We service the Denver metro area")
booking.planRequiredDesc: Online booking requires the Growth plan or higher.

integrations.comingSoonDesc: ServiceTitan, Housecall Pro, Square, and more

developer.apiKeysDesc: Use API keys to access QuotePro data from external applications.
developer.webhooksDesc: Configure webhook endpoints to receive real-time events from QuotePro.

referrals.yourLinkDesc: Share your referral link with other cleaning company owners. When they subscribe to any paid plan, you earn one free month of QuotePro.
referrals.step1: Copy your unique referral link above
referrals.step2: Share it with other residential cleaning company owners
referrals.step3: They sign up and subscribe to any paid plan
referrals.step4: You automatically earn one free month of QuotePro

referAndEarn.title: Refer & Earn
referAndEarn.description: Earn 50% recurring commission for every business you refer.
